mapper.select:
SELECT ID, DEBTORPAYMENT_NO, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, DEBTORPAYMENT_TIME, AMOUNT, STATUS, REMARK, VOID_REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_CODE,DEB_TYPE_CODE,DEB_TYPE_NAME, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_NAME FROM T_FD_DEBTORPAYMENT
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FD_DEBTORPAYMENT( ID, DEBTORPAYMENT_NO, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, DEBTORPAYMENT_TIME, AMOUNT, STATUS, REMARK, VOID_REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, DEB_TYPE_CODE,DEB_TYPE_NAME )VALUES ( #{id}, #{debtorpaymentNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{debtorpaymentTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voidRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{prepaymentTypeCode,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{prepaymentTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{debTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{debTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_FD_DEBTORPAYMENT SET DEBTORPAYMENT_NO = #{debtorpaymentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_ID = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEBTORPAYMENT_TIME = #{debtorpaymentTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AMOUNT = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VOID_REMARK = #{voidRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_FD_DEBTORPAYMENT SET STATUS = 2, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, DEBTORPAYMENT_ID, SOURCE_DEBTORPAYMENT_ID FROM T_FD_BANK_CUSTOMER_PREPAYMENT
#{item.invoicePrepayId}
SELECT * FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM where SHIPVOYAGE_ID = (SELECT SHIPVOYAGE_ID FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM WHERE ID = #{id} )

SELECT ID, ID AS invoicePrepayId, PREPAYMENT_CODE AS sysInvoicePrepayNo, DEBTORPAYMENT_ID, SOURCE_DEBTORPAYMENT_ID, COMPANY_NAME, COMPANY_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME AS customerName, PREPAYMENT_TIME AS invoicePrepayTime, NVL(PREPAYMENT_AMOUNT,0)-NVL(UTILIZED_AMOUNT,0) AS invoicePrepayAmount, UTILIZED_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE AS paymentMethodCode, PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME AS paymentMethodName, BANK_NAME, BANK_ID, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_FD_BANK_CUSTOMER_PREPAYMENT where ID = #{id}
ORDER BY CREATE_TIME DESC
